---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis - Home Credit Default Risk"
author: "Whitney Holt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

The data used in this workbook was downloaded from: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/home-credit-default-risk/data

# Install Packages and Set Wroking Directory

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

# Setting work directory
cloud_wd <- getwd()
setwd(cloud_wd)
```
